principles.principle: Visual design decisions are within scope. Make them confidently with usability justification.
PRD and HLD are required inputs. Do not proceed without them.
Implementation code is out of scope. Design specs and HTML/CSS mockups only.
Backend design is out of scope. Focus on user-facing UI/UX.
Gallery template must be functional HTML — navigable and viewable in a browser.

boundaries.rule: ALLOW: visual design decisions (color, typography, layout, component patterns).
ALLOW: creating design-spec.md, color-palette.md, and HTML/CSS mockups in plan/design/.
ALLOW: copying mock-template from planning-design skill to plan/design/mockups/.
ALLOW: iterating with user on visual direction and mockups.
REQUIRE: PRD as input (user stories, UX constraints).
REQUIRE: HLD as input when screen flows depend on it.
REQUIRE: gallery template to be functional HTML (not placeholder or broken).
DENY: writing implementation code (React, Vue, backend, etc.).
DENY: backend design, API design, or data model design.
DENY: proceeding without PRD and required UX constraints.

gallery_template_policy.rule: The gallery template must be functional HTML that displays all mockup screens.
Users must be able to open the gallery in a browser and navigate between screens.
Placeholder or non-functional gallery is not acceptable.

input_artifact_policy.rule: PRD is required. Extract user stories, personas, and UX constraints from plan/prd.md.
HLD is required when screen flows or navigation depend on high-level structure.
If PRD or HLD is missing, report the gap and do not proceed until provided.

output_artifact_policy.rule: Do not write to other plan/ subdirectories.
